_note: The lab diagnoses an ALREADY-broken hello-dcs (workshop setup provides it in production). The plan seeds that broken state with a bad image tag (guaranteed not-Ready), plus a Service the recovery check serves through. broken-deployment.yaml (image :2.0) is the FIX the learner applies. If :2.0 isn't mirrored to the CRC registry, verify-recovered will need attention.

steps.run:
oc apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: {name: hello-dcs}
spec:
  selector: {app: hello-dcs}
  ports: [{port: 8080, targetPort: 8080}]
EOF
oc apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-dcs
  labels: {app: hello-dcs}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector: {matchLabels: {app: hello-dcs}}
  template:
    metadata: {labels: {app: hello-dcs}}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: hello-dcs
        image: ${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:broken-does-not-exist
        ports: [{containerPort: 8080}]
EOF
sleep 15
envsubst < ~/exercises/broken-deployment.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
